tooltip.archeofll.canopic_jar.1: A ceremonial vessel used in mummification.
tooltip.archeofll.canopic_jar.2: It once preserved the organs of the deceased.
tooltip.archeofll.ushabti.1: A small funerary figurine placed in tombs.
tooltip.archeofll.ushabti.2: It was meant to serve the dead in the afterlife.
tooltip.archeofll.scarab_amulet.1: An amulet carved in the shape of a scarab beetle.
tooltip.archeofll.scarab_amulet.2: A symbol of rebirth and protection.
tooltip.archeofll.eye_of_horus.1: A sacred symbol associated with the god Horus.
tooltip.archeofll.eye_of_horus.2: It represents protection, healing, and power.
tooltip.archeofll.cartouche_fragment.1: A fragment of a royal name inscription.
tooltip.archeofll.cartouche_fragment.2: The pharaoh it once honored is long forgotten.
